title: Aradel Holdings Posts 55% Profit Growth, Driven by Strategic M&A and Value Creation - FinancialEDGE
description: Aradel Holdings Plc, Nigeria’s leading integrated energy company announces its unaudited results for the year ended 31 December 2025. Mr. Adegbite Falade, Chief Executive Officer, said: “Aradel delivered a strong and resilient performance in 2025, reflecting the quality of our asset base, disciplined execution, and the inherent resilience of our diversified energy portfolio. html: Aradel Holdings Plc, Nigeria’s leading integrated energy company announces its unaudited results for the year ended 31 December 2025.
